title: nasturtium stylatum
intro: Nasturtium stylatum, also known as Indian cress or water cress, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to treat conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The plant is rich in vitamins A and C, potassium, and other essential nutrients, providing several health benefits including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-boosting effects. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
